content: {"turn": 6, "page_state": "Jupiter DEX landing page showcasing swap functionality with SOL→USDC pair and feature highlights including leverage trading, yield strategies, and crypto transfer tools.", "action": "read", "reason": "Turn 5에서 fill(0.1)이 성공했고, diff에서 'value: 0.1'과 'Buy 필드 8.528452'가 확인된다.
